title: 4Pcs Fine Mesh Strainer Set, Food Soy Milk Flour Sieve Plastic Colander Strainer with Long Handle Multi Purpose Colander for Yogurt Tea Juice Sugar Kitchen Tools Accessories
features: Fine Mesh: The sieve features a fine mesh that effectively filters out impurities and creates a fine and uniform texture. It ensures that your baked goods and recipes turn out light and fluffy.

Long Handle: The sieve is equipped with a long handle, providing a comfortable grip and allowing you to sieve ingredients with ease. The extended handle also keeps your hands away from the food, ensuring hygiene and safety.
Easy to Clean:Nest the strainers together for space saving storage or hang them together within reach of where you use them the most. Dishwasher safe, very easy to hand clean.

Efficient Sieving: 4 sizes of fine mesh round strainers that are perfect for sifting and straining wet or dry ingredients. The fine mesh strainers enable quick draining of liquid from food with maximum ease, ensure only the finest grains of flour get through while ensuring no lumps.

Versatile Use:The strainers will be an everyday homemade tool that will help you serve up delightful treats. You can also sift powdered sugar & flour for superior baking and cooking preparation. Ideal for straining broth, gravy, sauces, pastas, jams, draining tea, cocktails, almond milk, quinoa, grains etc.
